# Wei-Hao Chiu Academic Website

> Official academic website of Wei-Hao Chiu, Ph.D., Associate Researcher at the Center for Sustainability and Energy Technologies, Chang Gung University.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://weihaochiu.github.io/)
- [About](https://weihaochiu.github.io/about.html)
- [Research](https://weihaochiu.github.io/research.html)
- [Publications](https://weihaochiu.github.io/publications.html)
- [Patents](https://weihaochiu.github.io/patents.html)
- [Projects](https://weihaochiu.github.io/projects.html)

## Research Expertise

- Perovskite solar cells
- Tin and tin-lead perovskite photovoltaics
- Scalable perovskite processing
- Vacuum-flash crystallization
- Blade coating and slot-die coating
- Charge-transport layers and interface engineering
- Self-assembled monolayers
- Photoluminescence, electroluminescence, and QFLS analysis
- Photovoltaic reliability and encapsulation
- Vacuum, radiation, and space photovoltaic environments
- Tandem solar cells
- Vanadium redox flow batteries

## Contact

- Personal email: weihao.chiu@gmail.com
- Chang Gung University email: d000019005@cgu.edu.tw

## Website Information

This website presents the academic profile, research expertise, publications, patents, projects, awards, and professional experience of Wei-Hao Chiu.
